code_changes.launcher: launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh now forwards CANARY_STANDARD_EP_WEIGHTED_SCATTER_BACKEND into TORCHTITAN_STANDARD_EP_WEIGHTED_SCATTER_BACKEND and prints standard_ep_weighted_scatter_backend in the run header.
code_changes.probe: tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/probe_standard_ep_weighted_scatter.py added for parity and timing of out[token] += score * routed_output.

single_gpu_probe.read: The Triton weighted-scatter backend is correct for gradients and finite in forward. BF16 output differs from torch scatter because duplicate-token atomic accumulation order differs. Isolated forward speedup is real but modest, roughly 4.5-7.7 percent on the tested shapes.

e2e_attempt.failure_phase: first forward hot-weight movement before weighted combine/scatter
e2e_attempt.failure: GPU memory access fault / SIGABRT while initializing or entering MORI/SDMA hot-weight all-reduce
e2e_attempt.read: This e2e attempt is inconclusive for weighted scatter. It did not reach the combine weighted-scatter path or produce tok/s/TFLOPs. Do not mark it as a performance regression or promotion.

do_sonle5_4x_visible_devices_4_7_mori_sd.failure_phase: standard-EP hot split / MORI SDMA hot-weight setup before weighted scatter
do_sonle5_4x_visible_devices_4_7_mori_sd.read: The 4x offset visible-device slice is not a reliable weighted-scatter gate. It failed before the combine path.

do_sonle5_4x_visible_devices_4_7_torch_h.intended_delta: CANARY_STANDARD_EP_WEIGHTED_SCATTER_BACKEND=triton with hot-weight movement switched to torch
do_sonle5_4x_visible_devices_4_7_torch_h.failure_phase: standard-EP hot split before weighted scatter
do_sonle5_4x_visible_devices_4_7_torch_h.read: Switching hot-weight movement to torch did not make the 4x offset slice usable. This still failed before weighted scatter.

do_sonle5_8x_weighted_scatter_mori_sdma.failure_phase: standard-EP hot split / MORI SDMA hot-weight setup before weighted scatter
do_sonle5_8x_weighted_scatter_mori_sdma.failure: GPU memory access fault / SIGABRT across all ranks
do_sonle5_8x_weighted_scatter_mori_sdma.read: The full-node weighted-scatter e2e gate did not produce tok/s or TFLOPs because it still failed before the weighted scatter path.

do_sonle5_8x_sdma_control_without_weight.intended_delta: control: same MORI/SDMA hot-weight shape, no weighted-scatter backend
do_sonle5_8x_sdma_control_without_weight.read: The same node can run the standard-EP top-8 MORI/SDMA control without the weighted-scatter backend. The weighted-scatter e2e failure is therefore narrower than a global node/MORI startup failure, but it still occurs before any scatter timing can be measured.

node_state.do-sonle5-mi350-gpu: After earlier co-scheduled attempts, all GPUs became idle. The retained-style 8x MORI/SDMA control completed two steps, while the weighted-scatter e2e gate failed before step 1.
node_state.do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu: Initial e2e weighted-scatter attempt failed before step 1; no performance metric was produced.

decision.next_action: Do not spend more promotion time on weighted scatter until the pre-step hot-split interaction is understood. The isolated kernel win is only 4.5-7.7 percent, and the current full-node gate cannot reach the combine path. The immediate high-return path remains MoE/EP layout and sparse-MLA backward, not this scatter micro-optimization.
